description_long: This object is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a tall, angular structure with a wide base that tapers slightly toward the top. The front face includes a large, slightly recessed display screen, likely intended for video gameplay, with a dark bezel surrounding it. Below the screen is a control panel equipped with two sets of joystick and button clusters, each set color-coded in red and blue, suggesting two-player capability. The cabinet is predominantly black, with no visible side panel artwork or decorative elements, giving it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. The top section, where a marquee would typically be found, is plain and unadorned. The side profile reveals the characteristic slanted design of arcade cabinets, with a protruding control panel and a deep, boxy body.
description: A tall, black upright arcade game cabinet with a large screen and a two-player control panel featuring red and blue buttons and joysticks. The cabinet is plain, with no visible artwork or marquee.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen, two sets of colored controls, and the plain marquee area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slanted profile, protruding control panel, and absence of side artwork.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, featureless back panel of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible control panel and no side graphics.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a dark bezel and no visible branding or markings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls, each with a joystick and three colored buttons (red and blue), arranged side-by-side for two-player use.
